programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que nuevas pruebas revelen que el asesino de Puerto a Puerto se ha infiltrado en la agencia, los equipos del NCIS siguen todas las pistas en una carrera por localizarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, las vidas de los miembros del NCIS corren peligro cuando se enfrentan cara a cara con el infame asesino de Puerto a Puerto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Palabras que hieren
programme.desc: Danny busca a una mujer que amenaza con suicidarse junto al responsable de la muerte de sus padres. Frank acompaña a su nieto en una excursión escolar y lucha por conectar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los derribamientos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el ataque a una embarazada víctima de un juego de pandilleros que golpean a civiles al azar. Mientras, Frank duda en promover a un oficial por temor a ser visto como favoritismo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Enmiendas
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una mujer que recibió una dosis letal de lidocaína durante una cirugía plástica secreta. Mientras, Frank asigna a Jamie un caso frío y Erin prueba el "speed dating".

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Arreglos secretos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un profesor universitario involucrado en un programa de becas cuestionable. Mientras, Danny descubre que su padre ocultó que el fiscal del distrito lo investiga por ética y procedimientos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La confrontación final entre el equipo de NCIS y un escurridizo traficante de armas llega a una conclusión explosiva y mortal en el estreno de la temporada cinco de NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En la autopsia, Ducky realiza un sorprendente descubrimiento que conduce a la búsqueda de un niño perdido. Mientras tanto, Tony se esfuerza para hacer frente a sus sentimientos por Jeanne.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a skittish suspect, a father-to-be leads police on a foot chase, and police struggle to get the truth from a wanted man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey on the wrong side of the highway. Officers sets up a reverse sting operation designed to capture a suspected drug dealer. Officers decide to pull over a driver who intentionally avoided a road block.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quiet passenger makes a run for it during a traffic stop, a stolen puppy is safely returned to its family, and a struggling woman hits a speed bump on her road to recovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick get the case of an elderly woman found mummified in her closet. Sara and Nick arrive to investigate a breaking and entering to find a raped teen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the latest heatwave in Las Vegas, with triple-digit temperatures, Gil and Catherine investigate a baby locked in a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is introduced to the Furry side of Vegas when a man is found dead on the side of the road, dressed in a raccoon suit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A severed head is shipped to Dr. Robbins from Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom goes to Jackpot to find the rest of the body and gets very little cooperation from the locals.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's appearance at the preliminary hearing on a rape and murder case goes terribly wrong when the only piece of evidence is thrown out on a technicality.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect's infatuation with Catherine results in her taking over a high-profile case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The sheriff is under political pressure to find who killed an air marshal with a car bomb that the sheriff witnessed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A teenager is found murdered on a construction site. Grissom, Sara, and Warrick follow the lead of blood on a hammer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lone holdout on a jury is found dead in the jury room. The eleven jurors who were voting guilty and who hated the dead juror are the natural suspects.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman found murdered in her home. Her resemblance to Sara causes Grissom to take a personal interest in the case and forces him to examine the decisions he has made in his life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick respond to an electrocution at a casino. The casino is hosting Japanese antiquities. The electrocution is just a ruse to steal the central piece of the exhibit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A robbery at a grocery store results in a shootout leaving five dead. The police officer at the scene believes Grissom has a grudge against him.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The whole team must investigate a crime where a husband and his porn star wife were murdered execution-style.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Sara deal with the death of what at first seems to be a transvestite.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Warrick y Grissom investigan la muerte de un hombre encontrado en una fiesta de la espuma.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un hombre que conduce con una estaca de madera en la cabeza muere frente a un casino.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una anciana choca con su coche en un restaurante lleno de gente. Uno de los clientes es el novio paramédico de Sara. Grissom y Nick investigan el posible asesinato por monóxido de carbono de una mujer en su casa.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick y Sara investigan un cadáver aparentemente de hace meses encontrado en las montañas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan a un espectador de cine que fue apuñalado hasta la muerte

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan el asesinato de un cómico despreciado que murió en el escenario, al parecer tras beber de una botella de agua contaminada.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Nick investigan la muerte de una domadora atropellada por su caballo a bordo de un jet privado. Sara y Warrick investigan un escenario de Romeo y Julieta en el desierto.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick investigan el asesinato de una mujer en el palco de prensa del estadio de un instituto.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un atraco profesional a un banco provoca la muerte de un detective. Mientras investiga el caso, Grissom se enfrenta a su pérdida de audición y otro CSI recibe una revelación personal.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encuentran en un bar y una de ellas es asesinada. Cuando una segunda pareja es asesinada de forma similar, el equipo sospecha que una pareja de asesinos en serie anda suelta.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando los principales sospechosos del caso del asesino en serie de Grissom son asesinados, Grissom sospecha que se trata de un trabajo desde dentro.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una anciana encontrada momificada en su armario. Sara y Nick llegan a investigar un allanamiento de morada para encontrar a una adolescente violada.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Durante la última ola de calor de Las Vegas, con temperaturas de tres dígitos, Gil y Catherine investigan a un bebé encerrado en un coche.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo se introduce en el lado Furry de Las Vegas cuando un hombre es encontrado muerto a un lado de la carretera, vestido con un traje de mapache.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When his mentor is killed while defusing a bomb, Horatio goes on a personal mission to find the culprit. Megan wonders if he is too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a priest is murdered, Horatio and the team must investigate. A lip print on a drinking glass sets a 12-year-old altar boy as a prime suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 5-year-old girl is murdered at a restaurant/playland catering to parents and children, and Horatio and the team must investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate the murder of a male stripper found dead after a female sex party. Evidence suggests he had sex prior to his death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family is slaughtered in their home, Horatio and the team try to find the killer with the evidence left at the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three people are shot and killed in downtown Miami during rush hour and Horatio and the team must catch the killer fast.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A professor from a local university is found hanging from a tree after being tortured, she had been tortured for at least 4 hours before the hanging.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an unidentified girl is found dead near a very strict rehabilitation camp, Horatio and the team investigate her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate when a prostitute is found stabbed to death and stuffed under a bed after the body was cleaned.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When it's revealed that a ring of underground labs are manufacturing deadly drugs, Horatio and Speedle investigate the situation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Speedle investigate when a burglar and rapist has been sexually assaulted and taped to his bedposts after being suffocated to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are exposed to radiation while investigating a murder, which leads them to an environmental lawyer dying of radiation poisoning.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate the murder of an eastern European immigrant stabbed to death in a peep show booth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team race to find new evidence for a murder trial already underway in order to avoid the conviction of a possibly innocent man.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La investigación de un tiroteo en la sala de emergencias de un hospital coloca al equipo de CSI en medio de un caso de asesinato que involucra al líder de una pandilla callejera importante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una parada de tránsito de rutina termina con el asesinato de un patrullero. El equipo de CSI debe resolver la obsesiva historia de amor de una joven para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una fiesta de fricción en una suite privada de uno de los hoteles de la ciudad que alberga a cientos de pasajeros de cruceros deja a una joven muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio se enfrenta a un antiguo archienemigo que ya se le escapó una vez, un caso de robo de identidad conduce al asesinato, la pregunta es: ¿quién lo hizo?.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Los Everglades de Florida infestados de caimanes y serpientes se convierten en la zona cero de una serie de asesinatos inconexos, justo cuando los incendios arrasan el raro ecosistema.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño avión choca contra un vecindario residencial, los restos revelan un cadáver en la bodega de carga, junto con medio millón de dólares en efectivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El mundo de los videos extremos de patinetas se vuelve mortal cuando la competencia se acalora dentro del estudio. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La temporada de impuestos comienza con todo cuando dos agentes de Hacienda aparecen muertos. Llaman a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Mac is shot, he finds himself in limbo between life and death, as he fights for his life, it’s up to his team to bring the shooter to justice.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fire chief – a friend of Mac’s – is killed in a blaze that used the same technique as a recently paroled arsonist.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team rushes to stop serial arsonist Leonard Brooks after he begins using fire against people from his dark past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Evidence found in photos at a crime scene on the Brooklyn Bridge sends Mac and Jo to San Francisco in search of a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators race to catch a shooter when Lindsay is injured during the attempted murder of a political candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a 20-year-old case involving a missing boy when the prime suspect is found murdered on the anniversary of the boy’s disappearance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist’s patients are being systematically murdered, the CSIs are forced to play along in a game of Clue in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must delve into the high-pressure world of elite prep schools when a student is murdered while studying for the SAT’S.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Det. Lovato’s cover is inadvertently blown, the CSI's investigate the Latin street gang she infiltrated when undercover.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: 4.700 kilómetros (S9 Ep3)
programme.desc: La evidencia encontrada en fotos en la escena de un crimen en el puente de Brooklyn envía a Mac y a Jo a San Francisco en busca de una adolescente desaparecida.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Sin palabras (S9 Ep4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para atrapar a un tirador cuando Lindsay resulta herida durante el intento de asesinato de un candidato político.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)
programme.desc: Mac investiga un caso de hace 20 años que involucra a un niño desaparecido cuando encuentran asesinado al principal sospechoso en el aniversario de la desaparición del niño.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un cuento de hadas retorcido cuando encuentran a una mujer con un vestido de gala en el fondo del estanque fuera del castillo de Belvedere en el Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo de alta presión de las escuelas preparatorias de elite cuando un estudiante es asesinado mientras estudia para el examen de ingreso a la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando descubren que la detective Lovato es una agente encubierta, el equipo de CSI investiga a la pandilla callejera latina en la que ella se infiltró.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Edwin y Érica se pelean la custodia de una hija con un temperamento muy fuerte. Eduardo dejó a su hermano en México, años después se lo encuentra en Miami con otro género.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Obligado por las circunstancias, un padre se tiene que separar de su hijo. Además, Andrea demanda a los padres de la niña que alquiló y exige que le devuelvan el dinero del depósito.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Jennifer trajo a su hija de Cuba, pero la joven no piensa ayudarla económicamente con la casa. Por otro lado, Roberto preparó y costeó la boda de la hija de su esposa, ya no quiere pagar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Cómo perder a un hombre en 10 días.
programme.desc: Una columnista acepta escribir, desde su propia experiencia, cómo lograr que un hombre se aleje de tu vida en solo 10 días.

programme.title: ¿Bailamos?
programme.desc: John Clark es un adicto al trabajo dócil que se siente atrapado en una existencia aburrida y soporífera. Una noche, su vida cambia tras ver a una hermosa instructora de danza que lo inspira a salirse de sus esquemas y aprender pasos elaborados.

programme.title: Te pido un taxi
programme.desc: Rodrigo está seguro de poder conquistarlas a todas, y nunca se queda con ninguna, porque para él, el amor no existe. En su juego se encontrará con Sol, quién romperá toda regla que él se ha impuesto.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: La Duquesa
programme.desc: Crónica de la vida en el siglo XVIII de la aristócrata Georgiana, Duquesa de Devonshire, antepasado de la Princesa Diana.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Confessions Of A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Mientras el inconformista creador de los programas de juegos favoritos de EE. UU. gana notoriedad por sus éxitos, se ve atraído al mundo de las operaciones encubiertas del gobierno. George Clooney dirige esta historia más extraña que la ficción.

programme.title: Tierra de sueños
programme.desc: Un joven se encuentra en un dilema, cuando descubre a una ladrona de bancos escondiéndose en su pequeña aldea; entre reclamar la recompensa por su cabeza y su creciente atracción por la seductora delincuente.

programme.title: Rocketman (ESP)
programme.desc: Esta película biográfica musical única emprende el espectacular viaje de Elton John a la fama.

programme.title: Telaraña
programme.desc: Después de la horrible muerte de su compañero, el detective y escritor Alex Cross se ha refugiado en la paz de su retiro. Pero cuando un criminal brillante (Michael Wincott) secuestra a la hija de un senador, Alex debe volver a la acción.

programme.title: Extraordinary Measures (Cbs Films)
programme.desc: La determinación empuja a un padre idealista a unir fuerzas con un investigador médico solitario para encontrar una cura antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y la ultima cruzada
programme.desc: No hay nada más emocionante que intentar seguir el ritmo de los Jones en «Indiana Jones y la última cruzada». Los enemigos nazis de Indy han vuelto y han secuestrado a su padre, en su intento por localizar el sagrado Santo Grial.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: Top Gun: "Pasión y gloria"
programme.desc: Tom Cruise es el magnífico Maverick Mitchell, un joven piloto que está dispuesto a ser el mejor. Y Kelly McGillis interpreta al instructor que le enseña a Maverick algunas cosas que no se aprenden en clase.

programme.title: Asesino a Sueldo
programme.desc: Slevin (Josh Hartnett) se marcha de Los Ángeles, por un error de identidad cae en medio de una guerra entre los dos jefes criminales más temidos de la ciudad: El rabino (Ben Kingsley) y el jefe (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Narco asesinos
programme.desc: Tras una brutal masacre de narcos, Felipe, Rosa y su hermano Pedro parten en busca de venganza desde su pacífico pueblo hasta México.

programme.title: Un plan infalible
programme.desc: Un ingenioso trío de ladrones disfrazados debe luchar por sus vidas y el botín cuando un verdadero criminal maestro los chantajea para que planifiquen y ejecuten un atraco de $20 millones. Protagonizada por Ryan Reynolds.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen stars in this epic, sword-clashing adventure about a fallen warrior battling to avenge his dishonored master (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película
programme.desc: Él es la loca estrella submarina de un océano lleno de aventuras, él es Bob Esponja en su debut en la película original!

programme.title: Bob Esponja: un héroe fuera del agua
programme.desc: Con la misión de salvar su mundo, ¡Bob Esponja se dirige al nuestro por primera vez en la vida! Cuando el pirata Barba Burger roba la receta de las Cangreburger, Bob Esponja y sus amigos se transformarán en superhéroes para vencer al supervillano.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película
programme.desc: Él es la loca estrella submarina de un océano lleno de aventuras, él es Bob Esponja en su debut en la película original!

programme.title: Bob Esponja: un héroe fuera del agua
programme.desc: Con la misión de salvar su mundo, ¡Bob Esponja se dirige al nuestro por primera vez en la vida! Cuando el pirata Barba Burger roba la receta de las Cangreburger, Bob Esponja y sus amigos se transformarán en superhéroes para vencer al supervillano.

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: La novela épica de redención de Lew Wallace vuelve con esta conmovedora adaptación en la que un noble inculpado (Jack Huston) sobrevive a años de esclavitud para vengarse del amigo (Toby Kebbell) que lo traicionó. Coprotagonizada por Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Chicas pesadas
programme.desc: Tras vivir en África, Cady descubre lo salvaje que puede ser la civilización al enfrentarse a la reina del colegio: la fría y popular Regina George.

programme.title: Chicas pesadas 2
programme.desc: Las Plásticas están de regreso en la secuela del gran éxito Mean Girls… ¡y ahora la hermandad es más moderna, divertida y feroz que nunca!

programme.title: Tiro Penal (Jugar Duro)
programme.desc: Vinnie Jones es Danny Meehan, una superestrella del fútbol que lo tenía todo; dinero, coches deslumbrantes y una top model por novia. Pero ahora todo se ha terminado y cuando acaba entre rejas por golpear a un policía, las cosas cambian de mal a peor.

programme.title: GAMBIT (CBS FILMS)
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: Outcasts
programme.desc: Dos mejores amigas y geeks de clase mundial superan una broma humillante de las chicas "cool".

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Sueño en otro idioma
programme.desc: En este drama mexicano ganador de premios, una lengua indígena peligra porque sus dos últimos hablantes no se hablan desde hace más de 50 años. Martín, un lingüista joven, intentará reconciliar a los viejos amigos. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Post Mortem (LAS)
programme.desc: Una mordaz comedia negra del director Pablo Larrain (Jackie).

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: Venganza diabólica
programme.desc: Un hombre conjura a un demonio aterrador llamado Pumpkinhead para llevar a cabo su venganza en contra de los adolescentes, quienes sin querer, mataron a su hijo.

programme.title: Texas: masacre en cadena 2
programme.desc: La familia de psicópatas asesinos más peligrosa vuelve a la carga. Después de secuestrar a la DJ Vantia Block, deben enfrentarse a un policía texano que los persigue.

programme.title: Ruta 666
programme.desc: Route 666 is the thrilling story of a Federal agent whose pursuit of an escaped witness brings him directly in contact with a highway haunted by a treacherous past.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: Man With The Gun
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: The Way West
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry's crime fighting is tested when rustlers employ modern techniques. The newspaper's scathing editorials bash Gene's methods and demand to call in big city detectives. Old methods are tested.

programme.title: Boots And Saddles
programme.desc: A British youngster inherits a ranch so burdened with taxes that he struggles to keep the property. Gene Autry befriends the boy, and becomes involved with an Army colonel's daughter and others.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: When cattle-ranch foreman Gene Autry learns that the new ranch owner, Sandra Knight, plans to raise sheep on a scientific basis, he must convince her to sell them as they will ruin the land.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments (1956)
programme.desc: Raised as an Egyptian prince, Moses (Charlton Heston) discovers his Hebrew heritage, hears God's call, and engages in a bitter battle with the Pharaoh Ramses (Yul Brynner) to free the Jews from slavery, leading them to the Promised Land.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: The glorious epic style of Cecil B. DeMille is exemplified in this story of the Bible's legendary strongman and the woman who seduces, then betrays him.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: Inherit The Wind
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy and Fredric March go toe-to-toe in this powerful recreation of a titanic courtroom battle in which an attorney faces off against a fundamentalist in a Tennessee town where a teacher has been brought to trial for teaching Darwinism.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Winner of ten Academy Awards including Best Picture, this electrifying musical sets the ageless tragedy of 'Romeo and Juliet' in the slums of 1950s New York and stars Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn, Rita Moreno, and George Chakiris.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Lisa attends a Women's Liberation League meeting, she gives Oliver a scolding for denying her equal rights and demands to swap chores. While Lisa does a stellar job at Oliver's work, Oliver's attempts at hers leave something to be desired.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Little Lori Baker, who after coming to stay with the Douglases on a rural experience program, is staying on at the Douglas farm. This city girl, like Oliver, has found that she loves the country life! Lisa decides to throw Lori a welcome party.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The residents of Hooterville assume that Oliver Douglas must be broke when Lisa is spotted looking for work and standing in line at the soup kitchen. But assumptions in this town, even logical ones, are bound to be wrong.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is having a tough time. He has no one to help him pick the apples from his orchard, and he's promised to teach Lisa how to drive. The neighbors are all injured from assisting other harvests, and Lisa has a run-in with a sheriff.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a gangster who passes as Oliver's doppelganger arrives in town with his wife and partner to hide out from the law, a rumor spreads that Oliver is a cheat. Oliver seeks to save his good name, and Lisa tries figure out which Oliver is Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: There is the old adage that warns never to discuss politics with your spouse... but what if you are both running for the same office?! That predicament comes true when Oliver and Lisa face each other in the Hooterville mayoral election.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to New York City to attend the wedding anniversary of an old friend. Meanwhile, Eb, always up to something, has a new invisible friend named Charlie. To get her way, Lisa introduces her own invisible friend... Natasha.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa gives the financially-challenged Eb her engagement ring to present to Darlene, his longtime sweetheart, so that he can pop the question. The ring is reportedly valued at $2,000, however, when Darlene's father has it appraised, it's a shocker.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to his son, Felix becomes coach of the boy's football team.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: After Felix induces Oscar to appear on the popular talk show Steinberg is guest-hosting, his roommate gives a riotous account of Felix's prissiness. Felix is incensed, and when Steinberg invites him to make a rebuttal, he leaps at the opportunity.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Blanche tells Oscar she is remarrying and invites him and Felix to the wedding.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix talks Oscar into being a big brother to Mike, a young boy in a reform school.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar hires Felix to cover an international wrestling match and is thrown for a fall by subsequent developments.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix's grandfather, tossed out by his wife because of his insane jealousy, arrives at his grandson's apartment.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix invests his and Oscar's money in Mr. Wing's Japanese restaurant.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix turns psychic in the Psychic, Shymcic episode of The Odd Couple. Invoking his ESP Felix warns a skeptical Oscar not to attend a gala dinner at which he is to be named sportswriter of the year. But Oscar ignores the danger awaiting him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are unaware that their teenage babysitter has a crush on Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's friendship with Jerry is almost destroyed in a feud over a neighbor's crabgrass.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Rob is offered a job as a humor consultant at a magazine for man-about-town, he runs into trouble with Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally is romanced by a secret admirer when the owner of a delicatessen delivers flowers with her sandwich.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are on their way to visit the doctor when they are trapped in a stalled elevator with a man who attempts to rob them.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The 'Alan Brady' writers entertain at a prison and Rob gets locked up with the inmates.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An old flame of Gillespie’s reappears in Sparta to ask him for some professional help in assuring that her land is willed directly to her daughter, the product of the affair that she and Gillespie had twenty years ago. Stella Stevens guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Jeanette Marshall is a teacher in Sparta who has eye for the gentlemen, but her multiple romances attract negative attention from the townsfolk, and eccentric Ashe Crowe makes it his mission to put a permanent stop to Jeanette's flirtatious ways.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The fun and games come to a halt when Edgar Van Buren, the wealthy host of an annual high-stakes poker party, is murdered. Gillespie and Tibbs must sift through the evidence of a case where everyone is a suspect, including the dead man’s wife.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a high-ranking hoodlum's son is found murdered he brings in the help of the androgynously named "Sydney"—a hit woman who's assigned to murder the three thugs responsible.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A meticulous and ruthless assassin and former government agent is hired by a rightwing cabal to murder a visiting Chinese diplomat.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller infiltrates a group of Vietnam War protesters, hoping to find who murdered an AWOL marine.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An innocent man isn't worried about a new murder charge against him, but he is afraid that once the police process his fingerprints, they will learn that he is a fugitive from a 25-year-old homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix once again returns to his hometown in California's Central Valley, this time to assist Armenian attorney Leo Kolligan in defending Juan Esparza, a farmworker accused of murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is approached one evening by a woman named Lisa Ralph, who says that she believes someone may be trying to kill her, possibly because she has a valuable manuscript that she inherited from her late father.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A woman hires Joe Mannix to find her missing brother, whom she says is an alcoholic living on skid row.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A teenage baseball team hires Mannix to find their missing coach, who is a parolee who been running, and hiding his identity, ever since he got out of prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis gets involved in the treacherous and deadly trade of catering when he oversees the annual charity banquet.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan insists that a man he helped condemn to death for a series of bombings is guilty, even after a post-execution explosion.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Albert determines that neither Leo nor Jacques killed Laura, but he is unable find any leads into who shot Cooper. Cooper says they must find the third man, who he believes to be Bob, the gray-haired man.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Ronette is attacked in her hospital bed by an unseen person. Jean Renault, brother of Jacques and Bernard, plans to blackmail Ben Horne for the release of Audrey. Donna meets with Harold Smith, a shut-in who had befriended Laura.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Leland confesses to killing Jacques Renault. Andy wants to take a new sperm count test. Rumor spreads that a food critic is coming to Twin Peaks. Jean asks Ben to set a trap for Cooper in exchange for Audrey's life.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper discovers he had forgotten about the message under his bed. Shelly and Bobby begin Leo's home care. Sternwood hears pretrial motions and declares Leo not fit for trial. Nadine comes home, still thinking she's in high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to catch an ATM robber with a bounty hunter who's better known for bringing in his capture more dead than alive.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Unhappy with the rut she's gotten into, Naomi decides to make a change and arrives home with the news that, after seeing an ad in the paper, she's decided to attend school to train as a flight attendant.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vinton is chosen to play Santa at the Raytown Mall. However, with too much practice, he loses his voice! So Mama fills in the last second as Santa Claus.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Naomi's plan to find a date for Iola backfires when the date is more interested in Mama.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama is appalled when she finds a girlie magazine under Bubba's bed while cleaning. When it's revealed that Naomi sold it to him, Iola, Mama, Aunt Effie, and Pearl form MOP (Mothers Opposing Pornography), and set out to boycott.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When the Bundys start having good luck, Al remembers the Bundy Curse and realizes he is doomed.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Marcy tries to imagine being in the bedroom to improve her ability to speak in front of large audiences, but her fantasies tend to go a little too wild.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly and Bud buy a car to share, but sharing a car leads to fighting, and the Bundy children have to double date.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: While Bud, Kelly, and Peggy spend the night impersonating the Village People at the D'Arcy's Halloween party, the Grim Reaper visits Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al tries to help a young man forget the idea of marriage. Meanwhile, Kelly gets stung by bees and becomes crazy.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Women take over the nudie bar and the bowling alley, so Al starts an organization called "NO MA'AM."

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When Al tries to change some batteries, the computer locks him inside a store. Meanwhile, Kelly and Bud celebrate Buck's birthday.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's carpool, consisting of him and three models, is chosen to promote a campaign to clean up Chicago.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Father's Private Life
programme.desc: Jim feels that his children need to work out their own problems.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Lessons in Civics
programme.desc: The county wants to build a new highway right through the old community hall.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: First Disillusionment
programme.desc: Bud is upset because he has lost a job to another boy.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Woman in the House
programme.desc: Jim wants to invite a friend of his over to the Anderson home.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: New Girl at School
programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and it is love at first sight for Bud Anderson.

programme.desc: Kathy trades her skaters for a magician's box.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Advantage to Betty
programme.desc: Betty is excited her tennis team has made the championships.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Big Test
programme.desc: For once in his life, Bud has studied hard for a big test.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Mr. French takes a two-week vacation to the west with the others staying home. When Bill is called away to South America for work, the children end up flying out west to be with Mr. French. It makes his vacation more enjoyable.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody and Buffy accidentally pull off the arm of Mrs. Beasley and it is a traumatic event.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When French and Bill both have to be out at the same time, Cissy agrees to babysit. Cissy gets a chance to go to a concert, so she has a friend take her place. She gets sick, so her mother watches the kids, who then calls her husband...

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When Bill returns home from a business trip, he finds that Cissy's hairstyle is different, Buffy has a new tooth, and he does not know who Jody's best friend is. Bill decides to stop traveling for his work, and become a full-time dad.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy wants more independence. Jody is allowed to go to some places on his own, but Buffy is not allowed the same privilege.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody wants to a club with the big boys, but they tell him he is too young. To prove he is old enough, they tell him he has to cut off some of Mr. French's whiskers and bring it to them.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A teenager from a royal family in Vienna wants to marry Cissy, and she wants to marry him. She thinks she is a grown-up who can make her own decisions, but Uncle Bill knows she is just in love with love and in love with something different.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.desc: The crew faces a web of issues building a 1970s Pantera for a 6'4" client.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides

programme.desc: Dave finally realizes one of his dreams by opening the Kindig Academy.

programme.desc: The survivors of Earth lie in hibernation, but the Doctor finds there has been an intruder.
